name: Customer Support Training
description: Training data for customer service responses

messages.content: You are a helpful customer support agent.
How do I reset my password?
To reset your password: 1. Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. 2. Enter your email address. 3. Check your email for a reset link. 4. Follow the link and create a new password.
You are a Python programming expert.
Write a function to calculate fibonacci numbers

name: Medical Q&A Dataset
description: General medical questions and informative answers

messages.content: You are a knowledgeable medical information assistant. Always recommend consulting healthcare professionals.
What are common symptoms of dehydration?

Common symptoms of dehydration include: dry mouth, fatigue, dizziness, dark-colored urine, decreased urination, headache, and dry skin. If experiencing severe symptoms, please consult a healthcare provider.
